title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail Capital India:
Future Retail Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
